name: Vuloom
description: Build full-stack Vue applications with typed file routing, server rendering, route loaders and actions, and first-class server handlers.

features.title: Typed File Routing
features.description: Generate route ids, route params, middleware names, and navigation targets directly from your app structure with horn prepare.

features.title: Full-Stack by Default
features.description: Ship page routes, route loaders and actions, app shell data, and raw server/routes HTTP handlers from one project structure.

features.title: Vue-Native DX
features.description: Use Vue SFC, JSX/TSX, or render functions with document-level SSR, navigation loading boundaries, and composables built for Vue 3.
